channel.title: Barangay Micro Business Enterprises Act of 2002 on Maharlikanism
channel.description: Recent content in Barangay Micro Business Enterprises Act of 2002 on Maharlikanism

item.title: Preliminary Provisions
item.description:
Section 2. Policy

The State will hasten the country’s economic development by:

item.title: Incentives And Benefits
item.description:
Section 7. Exemption from Taxes and Fees

All BMBEs shall be exempt from tax for income arising from the operations of the enterprise.

The LGUs are encouraged either to reduce the amount of local taxes, fees and charges imposed or to exempt BMBEs from local taxes, fees and charges.
